_meta.description: CWE to ISO 27001:2022 Annex A controls mapping

CWE-16.name: Configuration
CWE-16.requirement: Configuration management shall be established and implemented

CWE-20.name: Improper Input Validation
CWE-20.requirement: Secure development lifecycle shall include input validation

CWE-22.name: Path Traversal
CWE-22.requirement: Secure coding practices shall prevent path traversal

CWE-78.name: OS Command Injection
CWE-78.requirement: Application security requirements shall prevent injection

CWE-79.name: Cross-site Scripting (XSS)
CWE-79.requirement: Application security requirements shall prevent injection

CWE-89.name: SQL Injection
CWE-89.requirement: Secure coding practices shall be applied

CWE-90.name: LDAP Injection
CWE-90.requirement: Application security requirements shall prevent injection

CWE-117.name: Improper Log Output Neutralization
CWE-117.requirement: Evidence collection procedures shall ensure log integrity

CWE-200.name: Information Exposure
CWE-200.requirement: Data leakage prevention measures shall be applied

CWE-209.name: Error Message Information Exposure
CWE-209.requirement: Data masking shall be applied to prevent information disclosure

CWE-256.name: Plaintext Storage of Password
CWE-256.requirement: Data leakage prevention measures shall protect credentials

CWE-269.name: Improper Privilege Management
CWE-269.requirement: Information access restriction shall enforce least privilege

CWE-308.name: Single-factor Authentication
CWE-308.requirement: Secure authentication technologies shall be used

CWE-311.name: Missing Encryption of Sensitive Data
CWE-311.requirement: Cryptography and data leakage prevention shall be applied

CWE-312.name: Cleartext Storage of Sensitive Information
CWE-312.requirement: Data leakage prevention shall protect data at rest

CWE-319.name: Cleartext Transmission of Sensitive Information
CWE-319.requirement: Cryptography shall protect data in transit

CWE-327.name: Use of Broken Cryptographic Algorithm
CWE-327.requirement: Cryptography policy shall mandate approved algorithms

CWE-328.name: Use of Weak Hash
CWE-328.requirement: Cryptography policy shall mandate strong hash functions

CWE-338.name: Use of Weak PRNG
CWE-338.requirement: Cryptography shall use cryptographically secure random generators

CWE-359.name: Exposure of Private Personal Information
CWE-359.requirement: Data leakage prevention shall protect personal information

CWE-390.name: Detection of Error Condition Without Action
CWE-390.requirement: Logging shall capture and alert on error conditions

CWE-400.name: Uncontrolled Resource Consumption
CWE-400.requirement: Secure coding shall prevent resource exhaustion

CWE-434.name: Unrestricted Upload of File with Dangerous Type
CWE-434.requirement: Secure development lifecycle shall validate uploads

CWE-494.name: Download of Code Without Integrity Check
CWE-494.requirement: Security testing shall verify code integrity

CWE-502.name: Deserialization of Untrusted Data
CWE-502.requirement: Secure coding shall prevent unsafe deserialization

CWE-521.name: Weak Password Requirements
CWE-521.requirement: Secure authentication shall enforce password strength

CWE-532.name: Insertion of Sensitive Information into Log File
CWE-532.requirement: Data leakage prevention shall protect log content

CWE-613.name: Insufficient Session Expiration
CWE-613.requirement: Secure authentication shall manage session lifecycle

CWE-639.name: Authorization Bypass Through User-Controlled Key (IDOR)
CWE-639.requirement: Information access restriction shall prevent IDOR

CWE-640.name: Weak Password Recovery Mechanism
CWE-640.requirement: Secure authentication shall protect recovery mechanisms

CWE-770.name: Allocation of Resources Without Limits
CWE-770.requirement: Secure coding shall enforce resource limits

CWE-778.name: Insufficient Logging
CWE-778.requirement: Assessment and decision on information security events

CWE-798.name: Use of Hardcoded Credentials
CWE-798.requirement: Secure authentication shall not embed credentials

CWE-829.name: Inclusion of Functionality from Untrusted Control Sphere
CWE-829.requirement: Security testing shall verify third-party components

CWE-862.name: Missing Authorization
CWE-862.requirement: Information access restriction shall enforce authorization

CWE-863.name: Incorrect Authorization
CWE-863.requirement: Information access restriction shall validate authorization

CWE-918.name: Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF)
CWE-918.requirement: Application security requirements shall prevent SSRF

CWE-942.name: Overly Permissive Cross-domain Whitelist (CORS)
CWE-942.requirement: Configuration management shall enforce CORS policy

CWE-1104.name: Use of Unmaintained Third-party Components
CWE-1104.requirement: Security testing shall assess component maintenance status

CWE-1336.name: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements in Template Engine (Template Injection)
CWE-1336.requirement: Application security requirements shall prevent template injection
